crawl_restrictions: Registry seeds and explicitly linked official evidence only
No authentication, form submission, or whole-web crawl
No publication database or catalogue writes
Tracking parameters and fragments are removed before deduplication
exclusions: Generic navigation, search, contact, category, state-policy, and archive container pages
Government Schemes for Startups directory as a scheme identity
Startup India Programs directory as a DPIIT-owned programme identity
Partner-hosted opportunities without record-level DPIIT ownership evidence
redirect_rules: Accept redirects only when the final host remains on the allowlist
Use the normalized final URL as the canonical retrieval URL
